# Open Creative Intelligence, Built for Production

The open-weight AI video engine. Private by default, deployed on your terms, fine-tuned to your creative pipeline.

[Talk to sales](https://ltx.io/forms/ltx-contact-sales?kpi=api&placement=topmenu)

intelligence that can generate, understand,

and operate in the physical world.

//

The LTX Stack

## Build, Create, and Scale with LTX

[**LTX Models**](https://ltx.io/model)

Use input images, prompts, video, and audio to deliver frame-accurate control and rapid iteration. LTX-2 renders faster and integrates via API or enterprise solutions.

[Learn More](https://ltx.io/model)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68872d15af29880764eac4aa/695b7f94d7bb3ccec417daa4_card2.avif)

[**LTX Studio**](https://ltx.studio/)

All-in-one creative suite for AI video, from ideation to production. Built for creative teams, marketers, and production studios.

[Learn More](https://ltx.io/studio)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68872d15af29880764eac4aa/695b7f945f38b237776bece3_card1.avif)

[**API**](https://ltx.io/model/api)

Flexible and enterprise-ready, allowing teams to automate creation, integrate editing capabilities, and generate custom video outputs through simple, powerful endpoints.

[Learn More](https://ltx.io/model/api)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68872d15af29880764eac4aa/695b7f9235ac3103832250f3_card3.avif)

//

Innovation

## Research

LTX-2 is developed with a strong emphasis on research, collaboration, and real-world use. We design the model to be explored openly, integrated into production systems, and improved through shared experimentation and feedback.

[HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3) [GitHub](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2) [Join the Discussion](https://discord.com/invite/ltxplatform)

[**API**](https://console.ltx.video/)

Use the latest version of the model through a stable, self-serve API, designed for real workloads and predictable behavior in production.

[Get API Key](https://console.ltx.video/)

[**Open Source**](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-Video)

Access model weights, code, and research resources. Inspect, run locally, and build on top of the open LTX-2 stack

[Download Open Weights](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3)

[**Academic Collaboration**](https://ltx.io/model/grants)

Ongoing discussion, shared experiments, and real-world usage patterns, exchanged by teams and developers working with LTX-2.

[Learn More](https://ltx.io/model/grants)

//

Announcement

## LTX-2.3 and What We Built on It

LTX-2.3 Release from LTX-Studio on Vimeo

![video thumbnail](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/2129971027-762b4cc4a7f98a40a5835f1c9d84869f9c6794fd96b84833ecd560ff72f5e532-d?mw=80&q=85)

Playing in picture-in-picture

Like

Share

Play

00:00

02:11

CC/subtitles

Settings

CC/subtitlesOff

Fullscreen

LTX 2.3 is a major engine upgrade: sharper detail, stronger motion, cleaner audio, and native portrait up to 1080×1920. It’s a production-ready multimodal engine - built to be built on. LTX Desktop is our first implementation, running fully locally.

This engine is designed to be built on. We built on it first. [Learn More →](https://ltx.io/blog/ltx-2-3-release)

[Explore LTX 2.3](https://ltx.io/model/ltx-2-3) [Explore LTX Desktop](https://ltx.io/ltx-desktop)

Ready to Bring AI Creative Solutions to Your Organization?

LTX delivers secure, scalable solutions built for enterprise teams.

Customer Voices

## Success, Engineered Together

"For professional studios, this level of control is not optional.

Training and steering video models like LTX is the most viable way to align AI with real production needs, where predictability, ownership, and creative intent matter as much as visual quality"

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68872d15af29880764eac4aa/69539cc279ffd2dfa2c50567_Mohamed_Oumoumad_CTO_gear_production.jpeg)

Mohamed Oumoumad

CTO, Gear Productions

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68872d15af29880764eac4aa/695ab4f3a9f5d906e6728a74_logo-white-gear-production_gray.png)

## FAQs

### How does LTX relate to LTX Studio and LTX Model?

LTX is the overarching ecosystem that brings together our two core offerings, the LTX Studio and LTX Model. LTX Studio is a user-facing creative platform where advertisers, creative teams, and filmmakers can generate, edit, and produce videos with AI. The LTX Model is the underlying generative video technology that powers the platform. It is also available directly to developers through the LTX Model API and open source weights.

‍

### What products and services are available on LTX.io?

[LTX.io](https://ltx.io/) offers access to the LTX Studio, the LTX model family, API integrations, developer tools, and enterprise solutions for scalable video production. Additional services include workflow automation, team collaboration features, and model-powered creative capabilities.

### What is relevant for enterprise use from the product offering?

All of our product offerings are relevant for enterprise customers. To discuss your exact needs and build out a custom package, we recommend you reach out to our team.

‍

### What are the subscription tiers or pricing plans?

Pricing varies by product and usage. LTX offers flexible plans for individuals, teams, and enterprises—including subscription tiers for LTX Studio, usage-based pricing for the LTX API, and custom contracts for large-scale deployments. Contact the LTX team for tailored pricing options.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68872d15af29880764eac4aa/69445617becf4761ee3d478b_ltx-logo.svg)
